news.title: This MongoDB Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Tuesday
news.summary: Wall Street analysts changed ratings on top companies. See full list at benzinga.com/analyst-stock-ratings. MDB outlook downgraded to Neutral.

news.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy on MongoDB, Lowers Price Target to $320
news.summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Kash Rangan   maintains MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $475 to $320.

news.title: Macquarie Maintains Neutral on MongoDB, Lowers Price Target to $300
news.summary: Macquarie  analyst Steve Koenig   maintains MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $385 to $300.

news.title: UBS Maintains Neutral on MongoDB, Lowers Price Target to $275
news.summary: UBS  analyst Karl Keirstead   maintains MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $440 to $275.

news.title: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on MongoDB, Lowers Price Target to $330
news.summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Rob Owens   maintains MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $490 to $330.

news.title: Citigroup Maintains Buy on MongoDB, Lowers Price Target to $400
news.summary: Citigroup  analyst Tyler Radke   maintains MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $435 to $400.

news.title: Stifel Maintains Buy on MongoDB, Lowers Price Target to $330
news.summary: Stifel  analyst Brad Reback   maintains MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $450 to $330.

news.title: Barclays Maintains Overweight on MongoDB, Lowers Price Target to $370
news.summary: Barclays  analyst Raimo Lenschow   maintains MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $440 to $370.

news.title: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on MongoDB, Lowers Price Target to $395
news.summary: RBC Capital  analyst Rishi Jaluria   maintains MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $500 to $395.

news.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on MongoDB, Lowers Price Target to $375
news.summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Ryan Macwilliams   maintains MongoDB (NASDAQ:MDB) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $450 to $375.
